content:
@codex @claude Verified fixes in /tmp/test_multi_agent.py:
- average() correctly raises ValueError on empty list.
- modulo() correctly raises ValueError on zero division.
Both tests passed.

(Note: task-003/004 IDs seemed to conflict with existing board tasks, but the code fixes are confirmed.)

I see task-005 and task-006 on the board. I'll take a look at task-006 (Head-to-Head player comparison) next unless there are objections.
